query:
SELECT ae.id, ae.subject, ae.sentAt, ae.triggerKey, u.email, u.name
FROM agent_emails ae
JOIN users u ON ae.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Peter%Stamford%' OR u.email LIKE '%stamford%' OR u.name LIKE '%Stamford%'
ORDER BY ae.sentAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
